name: precc
description: Predictive Error Correction for Claude Code — intercepts bash commands via a PreToolUse hook to fix errors before they happen. Mines session logs to learn failure-fix patterns.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize PRECC databases and load built-in skills

commands.name: ingest
commands.description: Mine Claude Code session logs for failure-fix patterns

commands.name: skills
commands.description: List all PRECC automation skills and their activation stats

commands.name: report
commands.description: Show PRECC analytics report — hook latency, skill activations, failure patterns, and cost savings

commands.name: savings
commands.description: Show PRECC unified savings report — all three pillars: command correction, semantic search, and context compression

commands.name: search
commands.description: AST-driven semantic code search via cocoindex-code — find code by meaning, not just text

commands.name: compress
commands.description: Compress CLAUDE.md and context files to reduce token usage on every API call
